title: (Bullish Signal) NEM, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling NEM's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 51 similar cases where NEM's MACD histogram became positive, and 37 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 73%. Current price $65.40 is above $62.21 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 03/15/21 - 04/15/21, the price experienced a +5% Uptrend. During the week of 04/08/21 - 04/15/21, the stock enjoyed a +5% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/zd6fcv1gvkt61.png?width=1522&format=png&auto=webp&s=ba6e23899cda3dde92db66bbc2f403ea3491e387

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on April 13, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on NEM as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 76 of 108 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 70%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for NEM just turned positive on April 15, 2021. Looking at past instances where NEM's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise in 37 of 51 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 73%.

The 10-day Moving Average for NEM crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on March 18, 2021. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 12 of 17 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 71%.

Following a +1.60% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where NEM advanced for three days, in 220 of 319 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 69%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 169 of 267 cases where NEM Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 63%.

[Full information about signal](https://tickeron.com/news/10625452-newmont-s-nem-64-78-moving-average-convergence-divergence-macd-histogram-just-turned-positive?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
